tasks.compile:windows:bundle: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release/windows', { recursive: true });" && deno desktop --backend cef --no-npm --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output ./release/windows/runner.exe --icon ./desktop/assets/app-icon.ico --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --allow-ffi --allow-net=127.0.0.1,localhost --include ./.tmp/payload-manifest.json --include ./desktop/assets ./desktop/main.ts
tasks.compile:windows:installer: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release/windows', { recursive: true });" && deno desktop --backend cef --no-npm --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output ./release/windows/runner.msi --icon ./desktop/assets/app-icon.ico --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --allow-ffi --allow-net=127.0.0.1,localhost --include ./.tmp/payload-manifest.json --include ./desktop/assets ./desktop/main.ts
tasks.compile:mac:arm:bundle: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release/mac', { recursive: true });" && deno desktop --no-npm --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output /tmp/runner.app --icon ./desktop/assets/app-icon.icns --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --allow-net=127.0.0.1,localhost --include ./.tmp/payload-manifest.json --include ./desktop/assets ./desktop/main.ts
